title: Registry Object
description: Canonical representation of a governed object in the Ordivon Registry Control Plane. Bridges Document Registry, Artifact Registry, Checker Registry, Scanner surfaces, Auxiliary ledgers, Ownership rules, and Policy activations into a unified model. Prototype artifact — not a public release contract.

registry_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this registry object.

kind.description: What kind of governed object: document, artifact, checker, scanner_surface, ledger, schema, config_surface, generated_view, ownership_rule, policy_activation, legacy_scope, archive_snapshot, ai_handoff_packet.

path.description: Filesystem path relative to project root. Null for pathless objects (e.g., ownership rules).

authority_tier.description: How authoritative this object is: T0 through T6.

lifecycle_state.description: Where this object is in its lifecycle.

current_truth_allowed.description: Whether this object is allowed to carry current-truth status. False for proposals, candidates, generated views, legacy surfaces, and config files by default.

owner.description: Accountable party for this object. Required for active T0/T1 objects.

reviewer.description: Party responsible for reviewing changes to this object.

approver.description: Party that must approve transitions for this object.

source_registry.description: Which registry this object originated from: document-registry, artifact-registry, checker-registry, metabolic, scanner, ownership-manifest, manual.

discovered_by.description: Which discoverer/controller found this object. E.g., DocumentDiscoverer, ScannerDiscoverer.

registered_by.description: Who or what registered this object. Human name, agent name, or automated process.

generated.description: Whether this object is machine-generated (not human-authored).

generated_from.description: Registry IDs of source objects that were used to generate this one. Required when generated=true.

scope.description: Scope or domain this object belongs to.

depends_on.description: Registry IDs of objects this one depends on.

supersedes.description: Registry IDs of objects this one supersedes.

superseded_by.description: Registry ID of the object that supersedes this one.

last_verified.description: ISO date when this object was last verified accurate.

review_date.description: Next review date or last review date.

ttl_days.description: Maximum days this object can go without verification before being marked stale.

policy_refs.description: Policy or CandidateRule references that govern this object.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence references supporting this object's claims.

receipt_refs.description: Receipt references documenting this object's provenance.
